SEARCH
Package io.vertigo.easyforms.runner.suppliers

Interface IEasyFormsUiComponentDefinitionSupplier

All Known Implementing Classes:
FileUiComponent, RadioCheckUiComponent, SelectUiComponent, TextAreaUiComponent, TextFieldUiComponent
Functional Interface:
This is a functional interface and can therefore be used as the assignment target for a lambda expression or method reference.
@FunctionalInterface public interface IEasyFormsUiComponentDefinitionSupplier
